diagrams.title: Telnet Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the client-server architecture of Telnet with NVT in the middle
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Telnet establishes communication between client and server through NVT abstraction

diagrams.title: Telnet Option Negotiation Flow
diagrams.description: Illustrates the request-response cycle for option negotiation
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Telnet clients and servers negotiate optional features like echo and terminal type

diagrams.title: Telnet vs SSH Comparison
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing why SSH replaced Telnet for secure remote access
